channel.title: News on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in News on jamesm.blog

item.title: Polkadot News 2024
item.description: Major Polkadot developments in 2024 - from Polkadot 2.0 implementation to blockchain academy expansion. Track key announcements, protocol upgrades, and ecosystem milestones throughout the year.

item.title: Music Production: Ableton Live 12
item.description: Overview of Ableton Live 12 features, new devices, MIDI tools, pricing, and learning resources.

item.title: Polkadot News 2023
item.description: 2023 Polkadot ecosystem highlights covering the network’s evolution toward Polkadot 1.0. Features major developments including parachain expansion, staking growth, technical upgrades, and founder insights on governance and scalability.

item.title: News: Arturia Collection X
item.description: Announcement of Arturia V Collection X featuring 39 professional software instruments and sound emulations.

item.title: News: Arturia FX Collection 4
item.description: Announcement and overview of Arturia FX Collection 4 effects plugin suite with 30 professional effects.
